title: podman run/create: support all transports
body:
Support all image transports in podman run/create.  It seems we
regressed with v2 on that.

Fixes: #6744
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: I still want to add tests to make sure we're not regressing again in the future but I am running out of time today. For now, I let it cook a bit in the CI.

@baude @mheon @rhatdan PTAL

@edsantiago there's a new system test, PTAL

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
(Or, since CI is passing, I'm happy to submit that as my own PR after this is merged)

> LGTM but I sent you a friendly suggestion for improving the test: [vrothberg#2](https://github.com/vrothberg/libpod/pull/2)

Sure, I love your enhancements. Thanks, Ed!
@edsantiago I squashed our commits together and appended your signed-off-by :+1:
